name: kuras/pricer
description: Fuel price comparison platform for Lithuania

check: @php -r '$roots = ["src", "wordpress"]; foreach ($roots as $root) { $files = new RecursiveIteratorIterator(new RecursiveDirectoryIterator($root)); foreach ($files as $file) { if ($file->getExtension() === "php") { passthru("php -l " . escapeshellarg($file->getPathname()), $code); if ($code !== 0) exit($code); }} }'
